initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT i_brand, SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_returns
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1999 AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY i_brand
ORDER BY total_returns DESC
LIMIT 100

  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
